query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, pe.estabelecimentoId, e.nome as estabelecimento_nome
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN permissoesEstabelecimento pe ON u.id = pe.userId
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON pe.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE u.email = 'paulo.borges@safatle.com.br';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, pe.estabelecimentoId, e.nome as estabelecimento_nome
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN permissoesEstabelecimento pe ON u.id = pe.userId
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON pe.estabelecimentoId = e.id
WHERE u.email = 'paulo.borges@safatle.com.br';
